Why BluePeak

Built for traders who take this seriously

Every rule is published up front. Every payout is tracked. We built the firm we'd want to trade for.

Fair Evaluation Rules

Clear profit targets and drawdown limits, published before you buy — no fine print added later.

Fast Payouts

Request a payout on demand once eligible. Most withdrawals reach your wallet within hours.

Up to 85% Split

Scale your split as you prove consistency — start at 80% and grow to keep everything you make.

Scale to $400k

Consistent funded traders scale their account balance every cycle, no re-evaluation required.

The Process

Three steps from your strategy to funded capital

The same evaluation path for every trader — no shortcuts, no exceptions.

01

Pass the Challenge

Hit the profit target for your account size while staying inside the daily and max drawdown limits.

02

Verify Your Edge

Confirm your results in a short verification stage that mirrors real funded conditions.

✓

Trade Funded Capital

Get funded, request payouts on your chosen cycle, and scale your account as you grow.
